seo.title: Autolykos v2 — Secure, Memory-Hard Proof-of-Work
seo.description: Ergo uses Autolykos v2 — a memory-hard, GPU-friendly Proof-of-Work that keeps mining decentralized and accessible.
seo.keywords: Autolykos, ASIC-resistant, Proof-of-Work, PoW mining, GPU mining, decentralized mining, energy efficient, blockchain consensus, Ergo mining

description.intro: Ergo is committed to fair, transparent, and sustainable decentralization. That's why we use Proof-of-Work (PoW), but with a modern twist: Autolykos v2.
description.main: Ergo uses Autolykos v2 — a memory-hard, GPU-friendly Proof-of-Work that keeps mining decentralized and accessible.

networkStats.title: Live Network Statistics
networkStats.note: Example metrics. Updated: 2025-08-10 · Source: explorer · 24h avg

asicResistant.title: ASIC-Resistant
asicResistant.description: ASIC-resistant (not ASIC-proof): specialized-hardware edge is limited; commodity GPUs remain competitive.

energyEfficient.title: Energy Efficient
energyEfficient.description: Memory-hardness dampens the hash-per-watt arms race and extends GPU lifecycles, reducing e-waste.

fairLaunch.title: Fair Launch
fairLaunch.description: No premine, no ICO, no VC allocation.

whatIsAutolykos.title: What is Autolykos v2?
whatIsAutolykos.description: Autolykos is Ergo's unique, ASIC-resistant mining algorithm designed to maintain network decentralization and security.

benefits.decentralization: Decentralization by design: a wide GPU set stays competitive.
benefits.captureResistance: Higher capture cost: renting/buying 51% hash is harder.
benefits.battleTested: Battle-tested PoW with an ASIC-resistant twist.

memoryBottleneck.title: Memory bandwidth bottleneck
memoryBottleneck.description: Limits single-vendor ASIC dominance by making memory access the primary constraint.

broaderParticipation.title: Broader participation
broaderParticipation.description: GPU accessibility raises the bar for renting/buying majority hashpower.

miningDecentralization.title: Mining Decentralization
miningDecentralization.description: Distribution of mining power across the network (weekly refresh)
miningDecentralization.healthyNote: Healthy distribution ensures no single entity can control the network. Top-5 < 50% — healthy concentration.

quickStart.title: Quick Start: Mining Ergo
quickStart.description: Five steps to begin — see the full guide for details.

steps.installWallet: Install and secure an Ergo wallet.
steps.chooseMiner: Pick supported miner software for Autolykos v2.
steps.choosePool: Choose a pool (or solo) and note the connection URL.
steps.launchMiner: Launch with your address and pool URL if applicable.
steps.testStability: Test stability and thermals; avoid aggressive memory OC on day one.

pitfalls.memoryOverclock: Don't start with aggressive memory overclocks.
pitfalls.monitorTemperatures: Monitor VRAM temperatures and power limits.

whatIsAutolykos.question: What is Autolykos v2?
whatIsAutolykos.answer: Autolykos v2 is Ergo's memory-hard, GPU-friendly Proof-of-Work algorithm designed to keep mining decentralized and accessible.

asicProof.question: Is Ergo's PoW completely ASIC-proof?
asicProof.answer: No. It's ASIC-resistant (not ASIC-proof). By making memory bandwidth/latency the bottleneck, specialized-hardware advantages are limited and GPUs remain competitive.

minerSoftware.question: Which miner software works with Autolykos v2?
minerSoftware.answer: See the Mining Guide for current tooling and setup steps. It covers supported miners, configuration basics, and troubleshooting.

poolVsSolo.question: Pool or solo mining?
poolVsSolo.answer: Both are possible. Pools smooth rewards; solo depends on luck and has higher variance. Choose based on your risk tolerance and expected uptime.

hashratePower.question: Typical hashrate/watt ranges?
hashratePower.answer: They vary by GPU model, drivers, and settings. Start with stock settings, ensure stability and thermals, and consult community resources for optimization.

environmentalImpact.question: Is this approach greener?
environmentalImpact.answer: Memory-hardness dampens the hardware arms race and extends useful GPU lifecycles, which helps reduce e-waste and unnecessary upgrades.

cta.title: Start Mining Ergo
cta.description: Join thousands of GPU miners securing Ergo — start in minutes.

howTo.title: Start Mining Ergo
howTo.description: Quick steps to begin mining Ergo with a GPU.

installWallet.title: Install a wallet
installWallet.description: Set up a compatible Ergo wallet and secure your seed phrase.

pickMiner.title: Pick miner software
pickMiner.description: Choose supported miner software for Autolykos v2 and download from its official source.

choosePool.title: Choose a pool or go solo
choosePool.description: Pools smooth rewards; solo mining has higher variance. Configure according to your preference.

launchMiner.title: Launch with your address
launchMiner.description: Run the miner with your wallet address and pool URL if applicable.

testStability.title: Test stability & thermals
testStability.description: Start at stock settings, monitor temperatures, and avoid aggressive memory overclocks on day one.
